hero.tagline: From Farm to Quality – Trusted Agro Processing

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Sun Agro Process is a trusted agro-processing company specializing in rice milling and agricultural product processing. The company focuses on delivering high-quality grains while maintaining modern processing standards.
about.missionText: To deliver high-quality agricultural products through advanced processing techniques.
about.visionText: To become a trusted agro-processing brand in India.
about.valuesText: Integrity, quality, innovation, and commitment to the agricultural community.

steps.name: Grain Cleaning
steps.desc: Thorough cleaning to remove impurities and foreign materials.

steps.name: Husking
steps.desc: Removal of husks using advanced rubber-roll huskers.

steps.name: Milling
steps.desc: Precision milling to achieve the desired grain finish.

steps.name: Polishing
steps.desc: Gentle polishing for a premium look and texture.

steps.name: Sorting
steps.desc: Optical sorting to ensure uniform quality grains.

steps.name: Packaging
steps.desc: Hygienic and airtight packaging for maximum freshness.

list.name: Rice Milling
list.desc: Advanced milling machinery for consistent, premium rice output.

list.name: Grain Processing
list.desc: Multi-grain processing capabilities with modern equipment.

list.name: Packaging
list.desc: Hygienic, branded packaging in various sizes.

list.name: Bulk Supply
list.desc: Reliable bulk supply for distributors and institutions.

list.name: Wholesale Distribution
list.desc: Pan-India wholesale distribution network for all products.

quality.title: Quality Assurance
quality.subtitle: We Guarantee Quality at Every Step

partners.title: Farmers & Partners
partners.subtitle: Growing Together
partners.text: We work directly with farmers to ensure fair pricing and quality sourcing. Join our network of trusted partners.
